blocked_answer_not_streamed_as_partial_t.description: Blocked answers are emitted as a single token event containing the safe fallback, never as partial LLM tokens.
evidence: src/main.py query_documents_stream: calls engine.query() which runs full orchestrator
src/application/rag_orchestrator.py: answer is set to fallback before return
No LLM stream is invoked for calculation BLOCKED/FAILED paths

error_event_uses_error_code_not_str_exc.description: Streaming exception handler uses error_code=STREAM_INTERNAL_ERROR and exception_type, never str(exc).
evidence: src/main.py: trace_payload has error_code and exception_type, not str(exc)

sse_done_event_includes_validation_verdi.description: When validation pipeline is enabled, the done event includes answerability, validation, and repair fields.
evidence: src/main.py: done_kwargs includes answerability_data, validation_data, repair_data

calculation_results_in_sse.description: Calculation results (EXECUTED/BLOCKED/FAILED) are included in the SSE done event.

session_saves_safe_answer_only.description: Session manager saves the final safe answer (post-validation), not the raw LLM output.
evidence: src/main.py: session_manager.add_message uses result['answer'] which is post-validation

trace_does_not_leak_blocked_answer.description: Trace stores answer=None; blocked answer content is never persisted in trace.
